before_B2_arms_train: Require B1 decoding completion, production_eligible=true, gate verdict PASS, accepted_windows>=1000, accepted_sources>=5, holdout_rows_present=0, exact dependency/media/PTS hashes, and successful trainer replay validation.

Run the exact 2372-step CUDA parity with no CPU fallback. Pin baseline trainer SHA 8118ff0e8fbf1d573f61e1ce09de140cb2c9e9e62bf1d57b030560a55a157f47 and candidate SHA 9d2d326103da97afa1adc5f13bffc9560cc8f2d2af9942199a198568c9d44f3a; require them to remain distinct.

Require all 2372 loss entries and eight-row sample-ID arrays to match, identical final model-state SHA, and loaded-checkpoint state parity. Record GPU, driver, CUDA, cuDNN, PyTorch, dependency hashes, and output hashes.

Verify frozen B0 hashes: report 122e65913d54df6be6c3e5c6ca91229fc17d207674edc7a31ea705bafd6eb3a3, train b92218d47816e01893a687c6414bdaa5220f02be6d3b1c25b684128d12ee9c20, validation 39a07ed6d5211cbdc2ccc8a3f1f73b298a1ed262a6cae1f8a6190e5aa1533429; require 2249 train rows, 167 judge rows, and zero judge-parent training rows.

Run both arms fresh using canonical --b0-split-root, not --cvat-export-root; forbid --image-root-rewrite and --resume-checkpoint. Use official initialization, batch-size=8, SST batch-size=8, SST loss cap=0.25, steps=2372, seed=20260721, and occluded-prob=0.
Require identical human sample order between A and B. If eight distinct pseudo rows per batch are intended, explicitly reject within-batch SST duplicates.
